result:
Here are all available MCP tools (all prefixed `mcp__`):

**Gmail/Google (authentication only):**
- `mcp__claude_ai_Gmail__authenticate`
- `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Calendar__authenticate`
- `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Drive__authenticate`

**Ruflo-RAG** (`mcp__ruflo-rag__*`) — grouped by namespace:

| Namespace | Tools |
|---|---|
| **agent** | `agent_execute`, `agent_health`, `agent_list`, `agent_pool`, `agent_spawn`, `agent_status`, `agent_terminate`, `agent_update` |
| **agentdb** | `agentdb_batch`, `agentdb_causal-edge`, `agentdb_consolidate`, `agentdb_context-synthesize`, `agentdb_controllers`, `agentdb_feedback`, `agentdb_health`, `agentdb_hierarchical-recall`, `agentdb_hierarchical-store`, `agentdb_pattern-search`, `agentdb_pattern-store`, `agentdb_route`, `agentdb_semantic-route`, `agentdb_session-end`, `agentdb_session-start` |
| **aidefence** | `aidefence_analyze`, `aidefence_has_pii`, `aidefence_is_safe`, `aidefence_learn`, `aidefence_scan`, `aidefence_stats` |
| **analyze** | `analyze_diff`, `analyze_diff-classify`, `analyze_diff-reviewers`, `analyze_diff-risk`, `analyze_diff-stats`, `analyze_file-risk` |
| **autopilot** | `autopilot_config`, `autopilot_disable`, `autopilot_enable`, `autopilot_history`, `autopilot_learn`, `autopilot_log`, `autopilot_predict`, `autopilot_progress`, `autopilot_reset`, `autopilot_status` |
| **claims** | `claims_accept-handoff`, `claims_board`, `claims_claim`, `claims_handoff`, `claims_list`, `claims_load`, `claims_mark-stealable`, `claims_rebalance`, `claims_release`, `claims_status`, `claims_steal`, `claims_stealable` |
| **config** | `config_export`, `config_get`, `config_import`, `config_list`, `config_reset`, `config_set` |
| **coordination** | `coordination_consensus`, `coordination_load_balance`, `coordination_metrics`, `coordination_node`, `coordination_orchestrate`, `coordination_sync`, `coordination_topology` |
| **daa** | `daa_agent_adapt`, `daa_agent_create`, `daa_cognitive_pattern`, `daa_knowledge_share`, `daa_learning_status`, `daa_performance_metrics`, `daa_workflow_create`, `daa_workflow_execute` |
| **embeddings** | `embeddings_compare`, `embeddings_generate`, `embeddings_hyperbolic`, `embeddings_init`, `embeddings_neural`, `embeddings_rabitq_build`, `embeddings_rabitq_search`, `embeddings_rabitq_status`, `embeddings_search`, `embeddings_status` |

| **hive-mind** | `hive-mind_broadcast`, `hive-mind_consensus`, `hive-mind_init`, `hive-mind_join`, `hive-mind_leave`, `hive-mind_memory`, `hive-mind_shutdown`, `hive-mind_spawn`, `hive-mind_status` |
| **hooks** | `hooks_build-agents`, `hooks_explain`, `hooks_init`, `hooks_intelligence`, `hooks_intelligence-reset`, `hooks_intelligence_attention`, `hooks_intelligence_learn`, `hooks_intelligence_pattern-search`, `hooks_intelligence_pattern-store`, `hooks_intelligence_stats`, `hooks_intelligence_trajectory-end`, `hooks_intelligence_trajectory-start`, `hooks_intelligence_trajectory-step`, `hooks_list`, `hooks_metrics`, `hooks_model-outcome`, `hooks_model-route`, `hooks_model-stats`, `hooks_notify`, `hooks_post-command`, `hooks_post-edit`, `hooks_post-task`, `hooks_pre-command`, `hooks_pre-edit`, `hooks_pre-task`, `hooks_pretrain`, `hooks_route`, `hooks_session-end`, `hooks_session-restore`, `hooks_session-start`, `hooks_transfer`, `hooks_worker-cancel`, `hooks_worker-detect`, `hooks_worker-dispatch`, `hooks_worker-list`, `hooks_worker-status` |

| **neural** | `neural_compress`, `neural_optimize`, `neural_patterns`, `neural_predict`, `neural_status`, `neural_train` |
| **performance** | `performance_benchmark`, `performance_bottleneck`, `performance_metrics`, `performance_optimize`, `performance_profile`, `performance_report` |

| **task** | `task_assign`, `task_cancel`, `task_complete`, `task_create`, `task_list`, `task_status`, `task_summary`, `task_update` |
| **terminal** | `terminal_close`, `terminal_create`, `terminal_execute`, `terminal_history`, `terminal_list` |
| **transfer** | `transfer_detect-pii`, `transfer_ipfs-resolve`, `transfer_plugin-featured`, `transfer_plugin-info`, `transfer_plugin-official`, `transfer_plugin-search`, `transfer_store-download`, `transfer_store-featured`, `transfer_store-info`, `transfer_store-search`, `transfer_store-trending` |
| **wasm** | `wasm_agent_create`, `wasm_agent_export`, `wasm_agent_files`, `wasm_agent_list`, `wasm_agent_prompt`, `wasm_agent_terminate`, `wasm_gallery_create`, `wasm_gallery_list`, `wasm_gallery_search` |
| **workflow** | `workflow_cancel`, `workflow_create`, `workflow_delete`, `workflow_execute`, `workflow_list`, `workflow_pause`, `workflow_resume`, `workflow_run`, `workflow_status`, `workflow_template` |

**Total: 3 Google/Gmail + ~200 ruflo-rag tools** across 30 namespaces. All are deferred (schemas must be fetched before invocation).
